name: Shadow
description: Search everything Shadow has captured (screen text, audio transcripts, input) and summarize recent activity. Exposed as declarative HTTP tools that reach the device-local Shadow sidecar through Core's authenticated `/api/shadow/*` proxy (which injects Shadow's bearer token).
tagline: Recall what you have seen and done

config.description: Full-text search over everything Shadow has captured (screen text, audio transcripts, input). Returns matching timeline entries. Shadow capture is Windows-first; when the sidecar is not running the tool reports itself unavailable.

q.description: Text to search for across captured screen/audio/input history.

config.description: Semantic (vector) search over captured history. Use for fuzzy, meaning-based recall when exact keywords are unknown. Shadow capture is Windows-first; when the sidecar is not running the tool reports itself unavailable.

q.description: Natural-language query matched semantically against captured history.

config.description: Fetch captured timeline entries within an explicit time range (microseconds since the Unix epoch). Shadow capture is Windows-first; when the sidecar is not running the tool reports itself unavailable.

start.description: Range start, microseconds since the Unix epoch.

end.description: Range end, microseconds since the Unix epoch.

config.description: Summarize what the user has been doing in the last N minutes, drawn from captured history. Shadow capture is Windows-first; when the sidecar is not running the tool reports itself unavailable.

q.description: How many minutes back to summarize (Shadow defaults the window when omitted; typically 10).
